caption: A man with a large, grey, pointed wig, glasses, and black headphones is seated in a studio setting. He wears a white button-down shirt with a bow tie and gold-colored suspenders. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone, with a background consisting of numerous small framed photos and clothing racks. To the left, a circular logo reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST," and a similar logo appears on the right with the text "BOSS TALK 101" and smaller text below it. Throughout the sequence, the man speaks and gestures with his hands. In the first frame, his hand is blurred and low. By the second frame, he raises his right hand, pointing forward with his index finger. In the final two frames, he continues speaking, shifting his gaze slightly and lowering his hand back toward his chest.
